title: The Patience Premium
subtitle: Do patient investors win because they see more clearly, or because everyone else is forced to look away too soon?

chapters.label: I
chapters.title: The Question That Keeps Coming Back
chapters.subhead: Long-term thinking sounds noble. The harder question is whether it is measurable.
body: The investor-letter trail found in local notes circles the same idea again and again: patience is not a mood, it is a structural advantage. A patient investor can wait through periods that make other investors sell, explain, de-risk, or chase the next quarter.
The risk is that this becomes a bedtime story for people who like calm prose. A visual essay should make the claim earn its place: what would patience have to predict, survive, or reveal in data?

chapters.label: II
chapters.title: A Small Toy Model
chapters.subhead: Time horizon changes which cash flows are visible.
body: Move the horizon slider. Short horizons overweight the next few periods. Long horizons make durable compounding visible, but only if the business survives the wait.
This is not proof. It is a map of the mechanism that later charts have to test.

chapters.label: III
chapters.title: Where FactIQ Enters
chapters.subhead: The data layer should answer the exact claims, not decorate the essay.
body: FactIQ can search official datasets, query normalized tables, compute derived metrics, publish charts, and preserve lineage. For this essay, that means market data, fundamentals, rates, inflation, and earnings-call language can become auditable figures.
The first research pass should create a detailed FactIQ report. The second pass should promote only the strongest figures into the public essay.

chapters.label: IV
chapters.title: The Source Trail Is The Product
chapters.subhead: A reader should be able to disagree without getting lost.
body: Every serious factual sentence should map back to the claim ledger. Every chart should say what was queried, how it was transformed, and why the caveat matters.
That auditability is the difference between a persuasive essay and an attractive opinion.

claims.claim: The local investor-letter artifact repeatedly emphasizes patience, management alignment, consumer value, and business quality.
claims.evidence: Local Codex artifact: Nomad Letters Research Site data.

claims.claim: A patience thesis is weak unless it can be tied to observable outcomes or falsifiable intermediate claims.
The shorter the investor horizon, the less weight future durable cash flows receive in the decision.
FactIQ can provide market data, fundamentals, official macro data, and earnings-call search through MCP tools.
claims.evidence: FactIQ plugin README and skill file.

claims.claim: FactIQ is better for charts and data lineage than for academic literature review.
claims.evidence: FactIQ plugin scope and exposed tools.

claims.claim: The RentControl reference succeeds partly because it lets story, mechanism, evidence, and sources coexist without becoming a dashboard.
